candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Separate operating depreciation component beneath the D&A section. It appears to be part of operating overhead and is not embedded in the selected XSGA component rows. Included because the total D&A summary also contains impairment, which should not be used.
This is the summary D&A row, but it also includes impairment. Because impairment rows must be ignored for this task, using the summary would overstate pure D&A.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Employee Benefit Expenses' plus 'Other operating expenses'. The excerpt presents D&A as separate operating lines at the same level, so they appear outside those selected rows and should be added separately. The summary row 'Depreciation, Amortization and Impairment' is not used because it includes impairment; component D&A rows are chosen instead. R&D amortization is included because XRD is empty and there is no separate R&D expense row already being handled symmetrically.
